message:
🌱 podman-container-tools: [Bug]: podman build --secrets with environment variables does not work on MacOS (#1096)

* 🌱 Add podman-container-tools: [Bug]: podman build --secrets with environment variables mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: correct PR URL for podman#17382 build --secrets on macOS

PR #24271 was closed without merge. PR #27602 (merged 2025-12-04)
is the actual fix for podman build --secrets not working on macOS.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify podman-container-tools troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your podman-container-tools installation:
```bash
podman --version
podman info --format json | jq .version
```
Look for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review podman-container-tools configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant podman-container-tools configuration:
### Issue Description

Trying to pass secrets into podman build on MacOS does not function as expected
```
podman build --secret id=my_secret,env=MY_SECRET ls -l /run/secrets/my_secret
```

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [Bug]: podman build --secrets with environment variables…",
+        "description": "## 

## Testing using a shell

Create a `Dockerfile` with the following content
```
FROM python:3.9-slim-bullseye
RUN --mount=type=secret,id=mysecret echo "Secret is" && cat /run/secrets/mysecret
```
Create a `secrets.txt` file with the following content
```
filebasedsecret
```
Add an environment
```yaml
podman build --secret id=my_secret,env=MY_SECRET ls -l /run/secrets/my_secret
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm [Bug]: podman build --secrets with environment… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test podman-container-tools to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## 

## Testing using a shell

Create a `Dockerfile` with the following content
```
FROM python:3.9-slim-bullseye
RUN --mount=type=secret,id=mysecret echo "Secret is" && cat /run/secrets/mysecret
```
Create a `secrets.txt` file with the following content
```
filebasedsecret
```
Add an environment variable
`TEST_VAR=envvarsecret`

Once you have these files, run the following in your",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "podman build --secret id=my_secret,env=MY_SECRET ls -l /run/secrets/my_secret",
+        "FROM alpine:3.17
RUN --mount=type=secret,id=my_secret ls -l /run/secrets/my_secret",
+        "$ podman info

      size: 1000000
    uidmap:
    - container_id: 0
      host_id: 503
      size: 1
    - container_id: 1
      host_id: 100000
      size: 1000000
  kerne"
+      ]
